A Chrome extension that highlights the correct answer in online quizzes using AI when hovering over a question.
About A modern and secure web-based voting system for SLTC, designed to facilitate seamless and transparent elections. Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase

A professional, high-end cybersecurity portfolio website built with React, Vite, and Framer Motion. Featuring a sleek dark-mode aesthetic, interactive components, dynamic GitHub project fetching, and integrated contact functionality
